steps.title: Substitute x = −4 into h(x) = 7|x|
steps.content:
We need to find $h(-4)$. Substitute $x = -4$ directly into the function definition:
$$h(-4) = 7|-4|$$

steps.title: Evaluate the absolute value and multiply
steps.content: The absolute value of $-4$ is $|-4| = 4$ (the distance from 0 is always positive). Therefore: $$h(-4) = 7 \cdot 4 = 28$$ That matches choice D — D is correct.
